items.name: Marsec Munition Factory Dual MiniGun Black
items.description:
More Accessories here!
https://www.roblox.com/communities/16547842/Akari-Outpost-8#!/store

Originally tailored for mechanized infantry, this stalwart apparatus has transcended its origins, finding widespread adoption for its resilience and ease of maintenance. Whether donned by organic operators in power suits or integrated into mechanized units, its enduring durability remains unmatched.

The ability to swiftly accommodate various weapon mounts, offering adaptability even in the heat of battle. Its expansive design, housing a robust magazine and manufacturing unit, ensures a steady stream of ammunition production, making it ideal for prolonged missions where resupply is uncertain.

This variant is mounted with dual miniguns and can be calibrated to manufacture armor piercing, explosive or incendiary rounds. Though this setup can be devastating its payload is short lived so is best being backed up with a primary weapon while the Munition Factory can resupply its magazine.

items.name: Flying Magic Carpet
items.description: Fly through the skies of ROBLOXia on this magical carpet.

items.name: Nonmagic Carpet
items.description: This carpet used to be magic.  You bought it at a rug shop from a crying salesman because the situation was really awkward... Still it's cool to think that princesses and tigers used to fly around on this thing you just walk on when you enter the foyer.

items.name: Korblox: Berserker's Claymore
items.description:
Crafted using their corrupted magic, this claymore is as deadly as it is heavy. Handed down from generation to generation to the mightiest Korbloxian warriors, this legendary weapon was once wielded by Canavus himself. 

With its ability to double its strength in the blink of an eye, this weapon outmatches almost all weapons at close range. Only the mighty knight Xargas is said to have be able to hold his own against this claymore!

items.name: ✨Ethereal Blossom flowing sleeves Hanfu Gown-Black
items.description:
✨Ethereal Blossom flowing sleeves Hanfu Gown-Black

Ascend to a state of pure elegance with this breathtaking, layered fantasy garment. Inspired by ancient noble robes, this attire features a majestic high collar and a striking, graceful silhouette and dramatic, extra-long flowing sleeves accented with ribbons.

items.name: Wizards of the Astral Isles: Rat Plague Summoner
items.description: Summon a horde of infected rats to chase your enemies.  One bite and they're toast!

items.name: Regular Carpet
items.description: You walk past a rug shop, where a clerk tries to sell you a magic carpet.  You tell him you don't want a magic carpet today. He then admits to you that he was lying, and this really is just a regular carpet. His whole life is a lie. Then he starts crying. You kind of have to buy it after that.  This is a regular carpet and it literally does nothing.

items.name: Wizard Flight Spell
items.description: Take flight with this magic spell!  Jump to begin flight; control using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', or the arrow keys. Hit the space bar again to stop flying.
